title: Caldera - Local Data Staging in Writable Directories (Linux)
description: Detects data staging in world-writable directories prior to exfiltration. Caldera T1074 emulation copies or moves sensitive files into /tmp, /dev/shm, or /var/tmp before transmitting them. Detection is based on bulk copy or move operations targeting these staging paths from sensitive source directories.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*cp -r /etc*' or msg like '*cp -r /home*' or msg like '*cp -r /root*' or msg like '*cp -r /var/www*' or msg like '*cp /etc/passwd /tmp*' or msg like '*cp /etc/shadow /tmp*')) or ((msg like '*mv /etc/*' or msg like '*mv /home/*' or msg like '*mv /root/*')) or ((msg like '*/tmp/staging*' or msg like '*/tmp/loot*' or msg like '*/tmp/data*' or msg like '*/dev/shm/data*' or msg like '*/dev/shm/staging*' or msg like '*/var/tmp/staging*')) or ((msg like '*find / -name*' or msg like '*find /home -name*' or msg like '*find /etc -name*')))
